models.name: Gemini 3.5 Flash
models.subtitle: Near-Pro coding at Flash-tier pricing
models.description: Latest Flash model with near-Pro reasoning and coding capabilities. Cost-efficient at $1.50/$9 per 1M tokens with 1M context window.

models.name: Gemini 3.1 Pro
models.subtitle: Next-gen Gemini with advanced reasoning and coding
models.description: Successor to Gemini 3 Pro. Advanced intelligence with complex problem-solving, agentic coding capabilities, and powerful reasoning. 1M context window.

models.name: Gemini 2.5 Pro
models.subtitle: Balanced performance and affordability
models.description: Stable GA release. Reliable mid-tier Gemini for production workloads. Good reasoning at moderate cost.

models.name: Gemini 2.5 Flash
models.subtitle: Cost-effective fast responses
models.description: Optimized for speed and simple tasks. Great for chatbots and lightweight inference.

models.name: GPT-5.5
models.subtitle: OpenAI's most advanced frontier model
models.description: The latest and most capable GPT model. Excels at long-running agents, professional tasks, coding, and long-context reasoning. 1M context window.

models.name: GPT-5.4
models.subtitle: Cost-efficient frontier intelligence
models.description: Strong reasoning and coding at competitive pricing. 1M context window with balanced speed and capability.

models.name: GPT-5.4 Mini
models.subtitle: Fast and affordable GPT model
models.description: Compact model optimized for speed and cost. Great for high-volume tasks and conversational AI.

models.name: Grok 4.3
models.subtitle: xAI's latest reasoning model
models.description: Newest Grok model with high factual accuracy and strong reasoning. 1M context window at competitive pricing.

models.name: Grok 4.20
models.subtitle: Massive 2M context with low hallucination
models.description: Low hallucination model optimized for agentic tool calling. 2M context window for massive document processing and research.

models.name: Claude Sonnet 4.6
models.subtitle: Best-in-class model for coding and agentic tasks
models.description: Anthropic's latest Sonnet model. Optimal balance of intelligence, cost, and speed. Excels in software engineering, computer use, and complex tasks. 1M context window.

models.name: Claude Opus 4.8
models.subtitle: Anthropic's most capable model
models.description: Latest Opus with 1M context. Best-in-class for coding, long-running agents, and complex multi-step tasks.

models.name: Claude Haiku 4.5
models.subtitle: Fast, affordable, near-frontier intelligence
models.description: Anthropic's fastest and most cost-effective model. Near-frontier intelligence at a fraction of the cost.
